description_long: This is a modern bolt-action sniper rifle with a matte black finish and a precision-engineered chassis. The rifle features a long, heavy barrel for improved accuracy, and a large telescopic scope mounted on top for long-range targeting. The stock is a thumbhole design with ergonomic contours and a cheek rest, providing stability and comfort for the shooter. A bipod is attached near the front of the rifle for steady aiming when prone or on a surface. The magazine is a detachable box type, visible just in front of the trigger guard. The rifle also has various small details such as safety switches, bolt handle, and textured grip areas.
description: A modern black bolt-action sniper rifle with a thumbhole stock, long barrel, telescopic scope, and bipod for stability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, bipod legs, and the scope's lens aligned above the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the thumbhole stock, scope, bipod, and detachable magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock, cheek rest, and the alignment of the scope with the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bolt handle, trigger, and additional details of the stock and bipod.
